cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.TypeNa.Docs: The name of the hook.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.TypeVe.Docs: The version ID of the type configuration.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.Versio.Docs: The version ID of the type specified.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.
